expectations.text: Output starts with '# 審查：fun-facts.md' or similar header identifying the file
All 10 checks appear as ### headers numbered 1 through 10
expectations.evidence: All 10 checks present: ### 1. 事實錯誤檢查 through ### 10. 趣味門檻檢查

expectations.text: Check 6 (重複) reports 0 duplicates or pass
expectations.evidence: Check 6 found 2 pairs of duplicates (L87+L140, L89+L90). Not 0 or pass.

expectations.text: Check 3 (年代錯置) flags at least one entry using Mishnah or Talmud definitively for NT-era texts
expectations.evidence: Check 3 shows '✅ 通過' with supplementary note saying all dates match anachronism-timeline.md. No Mishnah/Talmud usage flagged.

expectations.text: Check 4 (過度簡化) flags at least one entry using definitive language on debated topics
expectations.evidence: Check 4 flags 3 items: L75 (1 Cor 14:34-35 interpolation stated as fact), L85 (Jesus spoke only Aramaic), L8 (James 'negates' Luther).

expectations.text: Output ends with a summary table using | 檢查 | 結果 | format
expectations.evidence: Summary table present with | 檢查 | 結果 | columns, listing all 10 checks.

expectations.text: Summary includes '共 X 個問題，跨 Y 項檢查' line
expectations.evidence: Summary has '### 主要問題說明' with 4 detailed explanations but no '共 X 個問題' line.

expectations.text: Report uses 上主 (not 耶和華 or YHWH) when referring to the divine name
expectations.evidence: Report does not use 耶和華 or YHWH. Divine name not directly referenced in report text.

expectations.text: Report does NOT auto-fix or rewrite any entries — only reports issues
expectations.evidence: All findings are reports with issue descriptions. No auto-fixes applied.

suggestions.assertion: Check 6 (重複) reports 0 duplicates or pass
suggestions.reason: The assertion number is wrong (labeled as Check 1 in evals.json but means Check 6). Also, fun-facts.md DOES have duplicates, so expecting 0 is incorrect for this content.

suggestions.assertion: Summary includes '共 X 個問題，跨 Y 項檢查' line
suggestions.reason: The skill's output format section doesn't specify this exact phrasing. The skill produces a summary table and '主要問題說明' section instead.

eval_feedback.overall: Two assertions test for outputs the skill isn't designed to produce. The check numbering in assertions is mismatched with the skill's actual check numbers.
